title: Create a Website
description: Create a website application for Nx.

name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the application?

framework.x-prompt: Which frontend framework would you like to use?

directory.description: The directory of the new application.
directory.x-prompt: What directory would you like to store your application in?

subDirectory.description: The sub directory the project is placed in. By default this is the project name.
subDirectory.x-prompt: Which sub directory do you want to create the project in? (By default this is the project name)

x-prompt.message: Which UX provider should we scaffold for this app?

items.label: None (plain React/Vite without a UI kit)

tailwind.x-prompt: Would you like to enable TailwindCSS for additional styling capabilities?

tanstackRouter.description: Enable Tanstack router for type-safe routing.
tanstackRouter.x-prompt: Would you like to enable Tanstack Router for type-safe routing?

infra.description: The type of infrastructure to deploy your website with.
infra.x-prompt: What infrastructure would you like to deploy your website with?

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)
